title: Telepass
description: Allowing players to teleport to each other.
body:
This mod adds TelePass'.

A player crafts a TelePass, however. It doesn't do anything for the player who made it. When crafted, it has the player's name, "'s TelePass." It has to be given away, dropped, found, or lost - and end up in someone else's inventory.

Right clicking this TelePass will then teleport the user to the creator of the TelePass. When the creator is offline or in another dimension it won't teleport.

Made with the purpose to bring TP into a more Vanilla+ spotlight. Instead of including a plugin to give players TP commands, this compass mod brings it to the crafting table with the idea of trust and modded Vanilla+ mods with friends.


This mod was requested by "Perfect Strange"

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
